title: The Birthday That Never Existed
theme: A birthday becomes a doorway into conversation.
sceneDescription: Chapter 3 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using paper pages, letter texture, soft handwritten-memory movement. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
